package.name: openral_foxglove_bringup
package.description:
Read-only live-scene visualisation surface for OpenRAL, wrapping upstream foxglove_bridge (ADR-0059). Exposes only the "Bucket-1" topics (camera images, /map occupancy grid, octomap point cloud, joint states, TF, robot_description) plus the Bucket-2 converter outputs (collision-capsule markers, voxel point cloud) over the Foxglove WebSocket protocol, with client-publish, service, and parameter capabilities DISABLED so the surface cannot actuate the robot. Ships a default Foxglove Studio layout in config/openral_layout.json, an opt-in compressed-image republish path, a Bucket-2 converter node, and an MCAP recorder.
ADR-0059 (docs/adr/0059-foxglove-live-scene-visualization.md) governs this component as the live-scene half of a hybrid with the OTel dashboard (ADR-0017, kept for traces/metrics). Any path that re-enables clientPublish/services (e.g. an E-stop button) remains out of scope and requires safety-WG review (CLAUDE.md §3).
